description.value: **Benefit:** Whenever you are affected by a polymorph spell or effect, your nanites adjust completely at a molecular level. For the duration of the polymorph effect, you are treated as only a humanoid for the purpose of effects that target creatures by type. For example, a ranger’s favored enemy bonus against constructs wouldnât apply to you while you are polymorphed, but nor would spells such as make whole. This trait modifies part of the androidâs constructed racial trait, but otherwise that trait is unchanged (a polymorphed android still canât gain morale bonuses, is still immune to fear, and so on).
